title: Furu's reinvented Tools
description: 3D models that give your tools a new depth without going too far from the vanilla look
body:
![title card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20b4cfd77d8ddfb7023f894cd9e0ca9a69571317.png)

A Minecraft resource pack that gives every tool a **fresh 3D redesign** that doesn't feel out of place in the vanilla game.

**It currently includes:**
- all swords
- all pickaxes
- all axes
- all shovels
- all hoes
- Trident
- Bow

Soon to come:
- Crossbow
- Mace
- Shield
- Totem of undying
And more...


<details>
  <summary>Highly recommended!</summary>

  [![Hold My Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce8f7333ef96b00e3d74c8a455f4896acbe9da1d.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)

</details>
